subtasks.description: Query TPC-H schema to identify top 10 customers by lifetime value (sum of order amounts) in BUILDING market segment. Return customer ID, name, segment, and total lifetime value.
For the top 10 customers identified, retrieve their complete order history including order dates, amounts, line items, product types, and frequency metrics to characterize their order patterns.

Reconcile customer lifetime value data with their order patterns. For each customer, generate a personalized retention narrative that references their specific order behavior, frequency, seasonality, product preferences, and spending trends. Output structured JSON with customer ID, lifetime value, and personalized narrative.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) for straightforward aggregation of customers by lifetime value in a single segment—multi-table join but simple grouping logic; (2) sql_gen (mid tier) for retrieving detailed order history with multiple joins and aggregations to characterize patterns; (3) cross_recon (frontier tier) to synthesize customer value and order pattern data into personalized retention narratives—this requires reasoning across multiple signals (frequency, seasonality, product mix, spend trends) and generating natural language that is contextually specific and persuasive, which demands high language reasoning capability. Frontier tier justified for the narrative generation due to complexity of multi-signal synthesis and personalization quality required for effective retention communication.

output.sql: SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_lifetime_value FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY total_lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderstatus, o.o_orderpriority, o.o_totalprice, l.l_linenumber, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount, l.l_tax, l.l_returnflag, l.l_linestatus, l.l_shipdate, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_custkey) AS total_orders, SUM(o.o_totalprice) OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_custkey) AS total_lifetime_value, AVG(o.o_totalprice) OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_custkey) AS avg_order_value, MIN(o.o_orderdate) OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_custkey) AS first_order_date, MAX(o.o_orderdate) OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_custkey) AS last_order_date FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_custkey IN (SELECT c2.c_custkey FROM customer c2 JOIN orders o2 ON c2.c_custkey = o2.o_custkey WHERE c2.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c2.c_custkey ORDER BY SUM(o2.o_totalprice) DESC LIMIT 10) ORDER BY total_lifetime_value DESC, c.c_custkey, o.o_orderdate, l.l_linenumber
